languages.title: Harshe
languages.subtitle: Zaɓi harshen da aka yi amfani da shi a ko'ina cikin app.
languages.noResults: Babu harsuna da suka dace da bincikenku.

phone.label: Lambar waya
phone.searchCountry: Bincika ƙasar, lambar, ko maɓallin kira
phone.noCountries: Babu ƙasashe da suka dace da bincikenku.
phone.countryButton: Canza ƙasa, a halin yanzu %{country} ƙari %{callingCode}
phone.tooShort: Wannan lambar wayar ta yi gajere sosai.
phone.tooLong: Wannan lambar wayar ta yi tsayi sosai.
phone.invalid: Shigar da lambar waya mai inganci don ƙasar da aka zaɓa.
phone.valid: Lambar waya ta kasa da kasa mai inganci

auth.onboardingTagline: Abokin aminci na sirri don lokuta tsakanin "Ina lafiya" da "Ina bukatan taimako."
auth.continueOnboarding: Ci gaba da shiga cikin jirgi
auth.createSubtitle: Zaɓi hanyar shiga don kare jadawalin tsaron ka.
auth.signInFailedMessage: Ba za mu iya kammala shigar da shi ba. Bincika haɗin ka sannan ka sake gwadawa.
auth.googleUnavailableTitle: Google Ba a samu rajista ba
auth.googleUnavailableMessage: Yin amfani da taron ci gaban gida. Native Google Sign-In yana aiki a cikin ginin ci gaba.
auth.northStarSubtitle: Haɗa yanzu ko ci gaba kuma ƙara shi daga baya.
auth.northStarBody: The VL01 wearable iya haifar da aminci kwararar tare da taps da dogon latsa gestures.
auth.meetCapybearSubtitle: Abokin aminci mai tawali'u a kan taswirar da kuma kira.
auth.capybearBody: Capybear iya taimakawa tare da yanayin gida, yanayin kulawa, yanayin gaggawa, kiran uzuri, da goyon bayan murya.

permissions.locationSubtitle: An yi amfani dashi don taswira, yankunan haɗari, isowa mai aminci, da mahallin SOS.
permissions.locationBody: VeryLoving tambayar wuri don masu kula da su su fahimci inda za a iya buƙatar taimako. Za ka iya canza wannan daga baya a cikin saituna.
permissions.notificationsSubtitle: Sanarwar tana tallafawa dubawa da abubuwan gaggawa.
permissions.notificationsBody: Muna amfani da sanarwar kawai don umarnin aminci, sabuntawar gaggawa, da tunatarwa da kuka kunna.
permissions.locationRationaleTitle: Wuri yana kiyaye mahallin tsaro daidai
permissions.locationRationaleMessage: VeryLoving yana amfani da wurinka don taswirar aminci, yankunan haɗari, rabawa mai sauri, da mahallin SOS. Za ka iya canza wannan daga baya a cikin saituna.
permissions.notificationsRationaleMessage: VeryLoving yana aika tunatarwa ta shiga, sabuntawar gaggawa, da umarnin aminci da kuka kunna. Ba mu amfani da sanarwar don tallace-tallace ba.
permissions.microphoneRationaleTitle: Makirufo yana ba da ikon kiran tsaro
permissions.microphoneRationaleMessage: VeryLoving amfani da makirufo ne kawai lokacin da ka fara AI abokin tarayya ko kiran aminci.
permissions.bluetoothRationaleTitle: Bluetooth haɗa kayan aikin ku na kayan ado
permissions.bluetoothRationaleMessage: VeryLoving yana amfani da Bluetooth don haɗuwa da kayan ado na NorthStar, karanta matsayin haɗi, da kuma haifar da kwararar aminci daga kayan sawa.
permissions.cameraRationaleMessage: VeryLoving amfani da kyamara ne kawai idan ka zaɓi ɗaukar hoton bayanin martaba ko raba hoton aminci.

tutorial.sharedBody: VeryLoving kiyaye wannan kwararar samuwa daga saituna da dashboard.
tutorial.chooseVoiceSubtitle: Zaɓi muryar abokin tarayya wanda ya fi aminci don ji.
tutorial.homeSubtitle: Kula da lafiyar yau da kullun don tsaro na yau da kullun.
tutorial.guardianSubtitle: Raba mahallin tare da amintattun mutane.
tutorial.emergencySubtitle: Famfo biyar na iya haɓaka zuwa faɗakarwar SOS da masu kulawa.
tutorial.excuseSubtitle: Samar da dalili mai kyau don barin yanayin da ba shi da daɗi.
tutorial.safetyCallSubtitle: Fara kiran abokin tarayya na ainihi lokacin da kuke buƙatar taimako.
tutorial.practiceSubtitle: Gwada kwararar tsaro a cikin demo mai ƙarancin matsin lamba.

jewelry.pairSubtitle: Ajiye kayan adon a kusa yayin scanning.
jewelry.noDevices: Har yanzu ba a gano na'urori NorthStar kusa ba.
jewelry.scanStartFailed: Bluetooth scanning ba zai iya farawa ba. Don Allah a sake gwadawa.
jewelry.scanFailed: Ba za mu iya samun kayan adon da ke kusa da su ba. Duba Bluetooth, ci gaba da NorthStar kusa, sannan ka sake gwadawa.
jewelry.scanAccessFailed: Bluetooth scanning ba zai iya farawa ba. Duba Bluetooth samun dama sannan ka sake gwadawa.
jewelry.permissionDenied: Samun damar na'urar da ke kusa da ita an kashe. Ba da izinin shiga Bluetooth a cikin saitunan, sannan ka sake gwadawa.
jewelry.connectTimeout: NorthStar ɗauki lokaci mai tsawo kafin a haɗa. Matsar da shi kusa sannan ka sake gwadawa.
jewelry.connectFailed: Ba za mu iya haɗuwa da NorthStar ba. Ka duba cewa an caje shi kuma yana kusa, sannan ka sake gwadawa.
jewelry.emptyTitle: Har yanzu babu na'urori da ke kusa
jewelry.emptyMessage: Ka ci gaba da caji NorthStar kusa da wannan wayar, sannan ka sake dubawa.

home.subtitle: Dashboard na Abokin Tsaro
home.readyBody: Murya, taswira, kayan ado, da masu kulawa suna da dannawa ɗaya.

map.title: Taswirar tsaro
map.previewSubtitle: Expo Go preview; Mapbox a cikin gine-ginen ci gaba.
map.updateFailed: Ba za mu iya sabunta wurin ka ba. Don Allah a sake gwadawa.
map.notRequested: Ba a nemi samun damar wurin ba. Za ka iya kunna shi daga baya daga saitunan.
map.permissionOff: An kashe. Ka kunna shi a cikin saituna don tsakiyar taswirar tsaro a kanka.
map.timeout: Wurin ka yana ɗaukar lokaci mai tsawo fiye da yadda ake tsammani. Matsar da wani wuri tare da siginar da ta fi bayyane sannan ka sake gwadawa.
map.savedEmptyTitle: Har yanzu babu wuraren da aka ajiye
map.savedEmptyMessage: Amintattun wuraren da ka ajiye za su bayyana a nan don samun dama cikin sauri.
map.geofenceEntered: You entered the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.
map.geofenceExited: You left the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.

safetyCall.connectingSecurely: Haɗa Abokin Hulɗa Tare da Abokin Hulɗar Ku
safetyCall.useOffline: Yi amfani da offline abokin tarayya
safetyCall.typePlaceholder: Irin wannan idan magana yana da wuya
safetyCall.emptyTitle: Tattaunawar ku ta fara a nan
safetyCall.emptyMessage: Fara kira ko rubuta saƙo lokacin da kuka shirya.

chat.notSent: Saƙon da ba a aika ba.

history.clearMessage: Wannan yana cire saƙonnin da aka ajiye AI abokai daga wannan na'urar.
history.cannotUndo: Ba za a iya kawar da wannan ba.
history.title: Tarihin tattaunawa
history.subtitle: AI saƙonnin abokin tarayya da aka adana a kan wannan na'urar.
history.empty: Har yanzu babu tattaunawar da aka ajiye.
history.emptyMessage: Tattaunawar abokinka ta AI za ta bayyana a nan bayan kiran ku na farko.
history.loadFailed: Ba za mu iya ɗora tarihin tattaunawa ba. Don Allah a sake gwadawa.
history.clearFailed: Ba za mu iya share tarihin tattaunawa ba. Don Allah a sake gwadawa.
history.deleteFailed: Ba za mu iya share wannan tattaunawar ba. Don Allah a sake gwadawa.

voices.title: Muryoyin kiran tsaro na tsaro
voices.subtitle: Zaɓi muryar abokin tarayya da ke jin daɗin ji.
voices.selectionFailedMessage: Dan Allah ka sake gwada zaɓar muryar.
voices.sampleFailedMessage: Ba za a iya kunna wannan samfurin murya ba. Don Allah a sake gwadawa.

settings.offlineModeSubtitle: Yi amfani da amsoshin abokin tarayya da aka haɗa lokacin da ba a samun takardun shaida Hume cibiyar sadarwa ko takardun shaida ba.
settings.privacyBody: Fitarwa ko share bayanan gida da aka adana akan wannan na'urar.
settings.exportFailedMessage: Ba za ka iya fitar da bayananka ba a yanzu.
settings.deleteConfirmMessage: Wannan yana cire bayanin martabarka, saituna, lambobin sadarwa na gaggawa, tarihin tattaunawa, tunatarwa da izini, da zaman auth na gida daga wannan na'urar.
settings.deleteFailedMessage: Ba zan iya goge bayanan gida ba a yanzu.
settings.linkFailed: Ba za a iya buɗe hanyar haɗi ba

sections.deviceSafetySubtitle: NorthStar, masu kulawa, da lambobin sadarwa na gaggawa

settings.updateFailedTitle: Saitin ba a ajiye shi ba
settings.updateFailedMessage: Ba za mu iya ajiye wannan fifiko ba. Don Allah a sake gwadawa.
settings.signOutFailedTitle: Ba za a iya shiga ba
settings.signOutFailedMessage: Zaman ka har yanzu yana aiki. Don Allah a sake gwadawa.

contacts.title: Lambobin sadarwa na gaggawa
contacts.subtitle: Amintattun mutane suna samuwa yayin kwararar tsaro.
contacts.name: Sunan
contacts.empty: Har yanzu babu lambobin sadarwa na gaggawa da aka ƙara.
contacts.emptyTitle: Har yanzu babu lambobin sadarwa na gaggawa
contacts.emptyMessage: Ƙara wanda kuka amince da shi don su kasance a shirye lokacin da kwararar tsaro ta buƙaci su.
contacts.removeMessage: Wannan mutumin ba zai ƙara bayyana a cikin kwararar gaggawa ba.
contacts.saveFailedMessage: Ba za mu iya ajiye wannan lambobin sadarwa ba. Duba cikakkun bayanai sannan ku sake gwadawa.
contacts.removeFailedMessage: Ba za mu iya cire wannan tuntuɓar ba. Don Allah a sake gwadawa.

friends.title: Abokai
friends.subtitle: Masu kulawa, buƙatu, da jadawalin gaggawa.
friends.emptyTitle: Da'irar tsaro ta ku ba komai ba ta da komai
friends.emptyMessage: Amintattun abokai da masu kula da su za su bayyana a nan da zarar an ƙara su.

emergency.title: Gaggawa SOS
emergency.subtitle: Yi amfani da shi kawai idan kana buƙatar taimako na gaggawa.
emergency.body: Wannan zai sanar da kwararar amincin ku kuma shirya lambobin sadarwa na gaggawa.
emergency.addContact: Ƙara tuntuɓar gaggawa a cikin saituna.
emergency.quickShareMessage: Location sharing stub is ready. Haɗa ƙarshen raba na baya don aika hanyoyin haɗin kai tsaye.

quickShare.title: Raba sauri
quickShare.subtitle: Kwararar raba wuri a shirye yake.

capybearTap.title: Capybear danna
capybearTap.subtitle: Danna sau biyu NorthStar ka sauke lemu mai tsaro.
capybearTap.body: Gesture route is ready for BLE event wiring.

errors.voiceOffline: Kuna da alama ba tare da layi ba. Za a aika saƙonku lokacin da kuka sake haɗuwa.
errors.voiceQueued: Saƙon da aka ajiye. Za a aika shi lokacin da abokin muryar ya sake haɗuwa.
errors.voiceConnecting: Haɗa Abokin Hulɗa Tare da Abokin Hulɗar Ku
errors.microphone: Ana buƙatar samun makirufo don kiran murya. Za ka iya kunna shi a cikin Saituna, ko rubuta saƙo a maimakon.
errors.billing: Abokin muryar kan layi ba ya samuwa na ɗan lokaci. Za ka iya ci gaba tare da offline abokin tarayya.
errors.authentication: Abokin muryar ba zai iya tabbatar da wannan zaman ba. Ka sake shiga ko ka yi amfani da abokin tarayya mara layi a yanzu.
errors.timeout: Muryar ta dauki lokaci mai tsawo kafin ta amsa. Bincika haɗin ka sannan ka sake gwadawa.
errors.network: Ba za mu iya isa ga abokin murya ba. Bincika haɗin ka, sannan ka sake gwadawa ko ka ci gaba ba tare da layi ba.
errors.genericVoice: Wani abu ya katse kiran murya. Sake gwadawa, ko ci gaba da abokin tarayya mara layi.

ios.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: VeryLoving buƙatar samun damar makirufo don aminci da kiran abokin AI.
ios.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: VeryLoving amfani da wurinka don taswirar tsaro da siffofin tsaro na kusa.
ios.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: VeryLoving yana amfani da Bluetooth don haɗi tare da kayan adon tsaro na NorthStar ɗinku.

releaseCritical.authUnavailable: Wannan zaɓin shiga ba ya samuwa a wannan sigar.
releaseCritical.continueAsDemo: Ci gaba a matsayin demo (don haɓakawa kawai)
releaseCritical.demoModeNotice: Yanayin demo yana amfani da bayanan bogi na cikin na'ura kawai. Ba a tabbatar da ayyukan da aka haɗa ba, kuma zaman nan zai sake farawa idan manhajar ta sake lodawa.
releaseCritical.authCodeInvalid: Lambar tabbatarwa ba daidai ba ce ko wa'adinta ya ƙare. Nemi sabuwar lamba sannan a sake gwadawa.
releaseCritical.authRateLimited: An yi ƙoƙarin shiga sau da yawa. Jira kaɗan, sannan a sake gwadawa.
releaseCritical.authTimeout: Tabbatar da shiga ya ɗauki lokaci mai tsawo. Duba haɗinka sannan a sake gwadawa.
releaseCritical.authNetwork: Ba mu iya isa ga sabis ɗin shiga ba. Duba haɗinka sannan a sake gwadawa.
releaseCritical.mapUnavailable: Ba a iya loda taswirar tsaro ba. Duba haɗinka sannan a sake gwadawa.
releaseCritical.mapCachedLocation: Wurin kai tsaye ba ya samuwa. Ana nuna wurinka na ƙarshe da aka adana daga %{capturedAt}.
releaseCritical.locationShareFailed: Ba mu iya raba wurinka ba. Duba izinin samun wuri sannan a sake gwadawa.
releaseCritical.locationShareCurrent: Ga wurina da aka rubuta a %{capturedAt}:
releaseCritical.locationShareCached: Ga wurina na ƙarshe da aka adana a %{capturedAt}:
releaseCritical.blePermission: An kashe damar Bluetooth. Kunna ta a Saituna, sannan a sake gwadawa.
releaseCritical.blePoweredOff: An kashe Bluetooth. Kunna shi, sannan a sake gwadawa.
releaseCritical.bleUnavailable: Haɗa Bluetooth ba ya samuwa a wannan na'ura ko sigar.
releaseCritical.bleScanFailed: Ba mu iya gano NorthStar ba. Ajiye shi kusa, duba Bluetooth, sannan a sake gwadawa.
releaseCritical.bleNoDevices: Ba a sami na'urorin NorthStar a kusa ba. Ajiye shi kusa sannan a sake bincikawa.
releaseCritical.bleConnectFailed: Ba mu iya haɗawa da NorthStar ba. Tabbatar yana da caji kuma yana kusa, sannan a sake gwadawa.
releaseCritical.savePlaceFailed: Ba mu iya adana wannan wurin ba. Sake gwadawa.
releaseCritical.sosDialerOpened: An buɗe manhajar kiran waya; ba a tabbatar da kira ba.
releaseCritical.sosCancelled: An soke; ba a yi kira ba.
releaseCritical.sosContactRequired: Babu lambar gaggawa da ake da ita; ba a yi kira ba.
releaseCritical.sosDialerFailed: Ba a iya buɗe manhajar kiran waya ba; ba a yi kira ba.
releaseCritical.sosUnknown: Ba a iya tabbatar da ƙoƙarin SOS na ƙarshe ba.
releaseCritical.voiceConfiguration: Abokin murya ba ya samuwa yanzu. Sake gwadawa daga baya ko ci gaba da abokin da ke aiki ba tare da intanet ba.

medicalProfile.title: Emergency medical profile
medicalProfile.subtitle: Information you choose to share during an SOS
medicalProfile.description: Keep this information current. VeryLoving attaches it only to a connected SOS after you enable sharing; it is not sent through the phone call itself.
medicalProfile.conditionsHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.allergiesHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.medicationsHint: Enter one per line: name | dose | instructions.
medicalProfile.emergencyNotesHint: Add details that may help your emergency contacts.
medicalProfile.shareLabel: Include this profile with connected SOS alerts
medicalProfile.shareHint: When enabled, reviewed details may be sent to your synchronized emergency flow.
medicalProfile.consentBody: Saving with sharing enabled records your consent and review time. You can turn sharing off or clear this profile at any time.
medicalProfile.saved: Medical profile saved and review time recorded.
medicalProfile.loadFailed: We could not load your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.saveFailed: We could not save your medical profile. Check the entries and try again.
medicalProfile.clearFailed: We could not clear your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.clearMessage: This removes the emergency medical information stored securely on this device.

medication.title: Medication reminders
medication.subtitle: Schedule home robot reminders and caregiver escalation.
medication.referenceHint: Use a short private schedule reference with letters, numbers, hyphens, or underscores.
medication.noRobot: Pair a home robot before adding medication reminders.
medication.escalationHint: Caregivers are alerted only if the reminder remains unacknowledged.
medication.saveFailed: We could not save this medication reminder. Check the entries and try again.
medication.loadFailed: We could not load medication reminders. Try again.
medication.acknowledgeFailed: We could not acknowledge this medication reminder. Try again.

wellness.title: Wellbeing & connected care
wellness.subtitle: Gentle activities, emotional check-ins, and coordinated device support.
wellness.connectedCareUnavailable: Connected care needs a signed-in account and the VeryLoving service. Local activities and mood history still work on this device.
wellness.scenarioFailed: Connected care could not start or update. Check your connection and try again.

cognitive.title: Cognitive engagement
cognitive.subtitle: Choose a light memory game, a trivia question, or a conversation prompt.
cognitive.connectedBody: Ask your home companion to start a gentle activity and follow its progress here.
cognitive.connectedHint: Starts the cognitive engagement scenario on your account-bound devices.
cognitive.activitySubtitle: There is no score to chase. Pick what feels comfortable today.
cognitive.emptyMessage: Memory, trivia, and conversation are ready whenever you are.

memory.title: Memory cards
memory.description: Notice three symbols, then recall the middle one.

trivia.title: Friendly trivia
trivia.description: Answer a familiar question at your own pace.

conversation.title: Conversation prompt
conversation.description: Use a warm prompt to recall and share a story.

memory.title: Remember the middle symbol
memory.instruction: Take a moment to look at this sequence.
memory.question: Which symbol was in the middle?
memory.incorrect: Good try. Take another look and go at your own pace.

trivia.title: Friendly trivia
trivia.incorrect: Not this time—and that is completely okay.

one.prompt: What color is a clear daytime sky?

two.prompt: What is the largest organ of the human body?

three.prompt: How many days are in a week?

prompts.one: What is a meal that brings back a happy memory?
prompts.two: Who taught you something you still use today?
prompts.three: What song always lifts your mood?
prompts.four: What is a place you would enjoy visiting again?

emotional.title: Emotional check-in
emotional.subtitle: Notice how you feel, save a short reflection, or invite your companion to talk.
emotional.moodQuestion: How are you feeling right now?
emotional.moodHint: Choose the closest answer. There is no wrong choice.
emotional.reflectionHint: Keep it brief. Raw voice audio and transcripts are not saved here.
emotional.reflectionPlaceholder: A few words about this moment...
emotional.privacyNote: Your mood history is account-bound, included in privacy export, and removed with account data deletion.
emotional.saveFailed: We could not save this check-in. Please try again.
emotional.connectedBody: Start a consent-aware Hume conversation through your home companion. A user-started check-in never invents a stress reading.
emotional.connectedHint: Starts an emotional check-in on your account-bound home companion.
emotional.historySubtitle: Only your last 90 private check-ins are retained on this device.
emotional.historyLoadFailed: We could not load your check-in history.
emotional.historyEmptyMessage: Choose a mood above when you are ready.
emotional.deleteMessage: This removes the mood and short reflection from this device.
emotional.deleteFailed: We could not delete this check-in. Please try again.
emotional.humeContextNotice: When you start reflection, your selected mood and optional summary are shared as temporary Hume context. They are not treated as a stress reading.

scenarios.title: Connected care scenarios
scenarios.subtitle: Coordinate your wearable and home companion with clear safety boundaries.
scenarios.connectedCareBody: VeryLoving resolves your paired devices on the server, prevents duplicate actions, and tracks every execution.
scenarios.demoOffline: Demo mode never creates a bearer token, so connected scenarios stay offline. Sign in with a real development account to test the server flow.
scenarios.signInRequired: Sign in again to use connected care scenarios.
scenarios.notConfigured: Connected care is not configured in this build.
scenarios.networkError: The connected care service could not be reached. Your wearable can still work over Bluetooth.
scenarios.stillRunning: This scenario is still running. Refresh its status shortly.
scenarios.genericError: The connected care action could not be completed. Please retry.
scenarios.chooseActionBody: Actions with safety consequences always explain what will happen before they start.

descriptions.fall_detection: Run an analytics-only practice. It never moves a robot or alerts a contact.
descriptions.medication_adherence: Ask the robot to remind you now; unconfirmed reminders can escalate to a caregiver.
descriptions.emotional_check_in: Invite a calming, consent-aware Hume conversation.
descriptions.cognitive_engagement: Invite a gentle robot activity and voice game.
descriptions.ai_angel_auto_dial: Start the confirmed cross-device emergency flow.

confirmations.practiceBody: This records a practice event only. It will not move the robot, call anyone, or send an emergency alert.
confirmations.medicationBody: The robot will remind you now. If you do not confirm within the adherence window, the configured caregiver escalation can run.
confirmations.emergencyBody: This starts the real emergency workflow across your paired devices and may contact your configured emergency contact.
confirmations.cancelCriticalBody: Stopping a critical scenario can end active emergency steps. Continue only if you are sure help is no longer needed.

scenarios.wellnessToolsBody: Check in privately or choose an activity before involving connected devices.
scenarios.recentActivityBody: Status is encrypted, account-bound, and refreshed while work is active.
scenarios.emptyMessage: Start a wellbeing check-in or another quick action when you are ready.
scenarios.started: Scenario accepted. Live status is updating.
scenarios.fallbackNote: A planned fallback completed because a preferred step was unavailable.
scenarios.failedNote: The scenario could not finish. Check device connectivity and try again if it is safe.

feedback.title: Was this helpful?
feedback.message: Tell us whether %{interaction} supported you. We save only the rating, not a free-text response.
feedback.helpfulHint: Records a thumbs-up rating for this completed interaction.
feedback.notHelpfulHint: Records a thumbs-down rating for this completed interaction.
feedback.error: We could not save your rating. Please try again.
